caption: A young man with blonde hair, wearing a dark t-shirt and headphones, appears in a small rectangular inset window on the left side of the screen. He is positioned in a room with a decorated Christmas tree visible behind him to the left and a white wall to his right. The main background is a purple gradient. Across the top of the screen, two sets of statistics are displayed: "MCV" with the number "88" and "ZCV" with the number "99" and a green "+4" next to a chevron symbol. Below each number is a horizontal progress bar; the bar under "88" is partially filled with green and white, while the bar under "99" is almost entirely green. Throughout the sequence, the man's expression changes from a neutral look to an open-mouthed, excited smile, returning to a more neutral expression by the end. The on-screen text and bars remain static.
